questions.q: In a morning briefing on May 2, 2026, it was reported that the US Defense Department ordered the withdrawal of how many troops from Germany?
Reported on May 2, 2026, US President Donald Trump formally notified Congress that hostilities had 'terminated' with which country?
As reported on May 2, 2026, which country suspended all cooperation with the European Parliament over an alleged 'Islamophobic' agenda?
According to reports on May 2, 2026, President Trump announced plans to raise tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to what percentage?
As reported on May 2, 2026, former Miami Congressman David Rivera was convicted of secretly lobbying for the government of which country?
